# Agarwal Mayank & Company — Chartered Accountants, Hapur, Uttar Pradesh, India

> TaxAMC is a CA firm based in Hapur, Uttar Pradesh providing GST, income tax, company registration, audit, and compliance services to businesses across India. WhatsApp: +91-9045222870

## About

Agarwal Mayank & Company is a Chartered Accountancy firm serving individuals, startups, MSMEs, and established businesses across India. The firm specialises in GST registration and returns, company and LLP incorporation, income tax filing, ROC compliance, audits, and business advisory services.

Primary office: Hapur, Uttar Pradesh (NCR region)
Service area: Pan-India, with local expertise in UP, NCR, and surrounding regions
Contact: +91-9045222870 (WhatsApp available)
Website: https://taxamc.com

---

## Core Services

### GST Services
- https://taxamc.com/article-gst-registration.html — GST Registration (who needs it, documents, process)
- https://taxamc.com/article-gst-returns.html — GST Return Filing (GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-9)
- https://taxamc.com/article-gst-audit.html — GST Audit (GSTR-9C, reconciliation)
- https://taxamc.com/article-gst-cancellation.html — GST Cancellation and Revocation
- https://taxamc.com/article-gst-refund.html — GST Refund (export, inverted duty)
- https://taxamc.com/article-gst-notice.html — GST Notices and Demands
- https://taxamc.com/article-input-tax-credit.html — Input Tax Credit (ITC) Rules
- https://taxamc.com/article-eway-bill.html — E-Way Bill Generation and Compliance
- https://taxamc.com/article-e-invoicing.html — E-Invoicing Under GST
- https://taxamc.com/article-lut-filing.html — LUT Filing for Exporters
- https://taxamc.com/article-ecommerce-gst.html — GST for E-commerce Sellers

### Company and Business Registration
- https://taxamc.com/article-private-limited-company.html — Private Limited Company Registration
- https://taxamc.com/article-llp-registration.html — LLP Registration
- https://taxamc.com/article-opc-registration.html — One Person Company (OPC) Registration
- https://taxamc.com/article-proprietorship-registration.html — Sole Proprietorship Registration
- https://taxamc.com/article-partnership-firm.html — Partnership Firm Registration
- https://taxamc.com/article-section8-company.html — Section 8 Company (NGO) Registration
- https://taxamc.com/article-msme-udyam-registration.html — Udyam / MSME Registration
- https://taxamc.com/article-startup-india.html — Startup India / DPIIT Recognition
- https://taxamc.com/article-trade-license-shop-act.html — Trade License and Shop Act Registration (UP)
- https://taxamc.com/article-fssai-registration.html — FSSAI Food License

### Income Tax Services
- https://taxamc.com/article-individual-itr-filing.html — Individual ITR Filing
- https://taxamc.com/article-business-tax-returns.html — Business Tax Returns
- https://taxamc.com/article-corporate-tax-filing.html — Corporate Tax Filing

- https://taxamc.com/article-tds-returns.html — TDS Returns Filing
- https://taxamc.com/article-tds-tcs-compliance.html — TDS and TCS Compliance
- https://taxamc.com/article-advance-tax-planning.html — Advance Tax Planning
- https://taxamc.com/article-capital-gains-tax.html — Capital Gains Tax
- https://taxamc.com/article-new-vs-old-tax-regime.html — New vs Old Tax Regime
- https://taxamc.com/article-income-tax-notice.html — Income Tax Notices
- https://taxamc.com/article-scrutiny-assessment.html — Income Tax Scrutiny Assessment
- https://taxamc.com/article-nri-taxation.html — NRI Taxation and FEMA Compliance
- https://taxamc.com/article-huf-taxation.html — HUF Taxation
- https://taxamc.com/article-tax-audit.html — Tax Audit Under Section 44AB
- https://taxamc.com/article-form-15ca-15cb.html — Form 15CA and 15CB
